creator: larshenrikoern@outlook.dk
text:
Hi

Thank you. And I do not need midi either at this time. But a bad thing if that part of FreeBSD is in such a bad shape. I did not try to make a build myself. I would probably could have sorted it out that way.

BTW. Nice to hear from another user of Frescobaldi. Then there are at least two of us :-) I am depending on it for work from time to time-

Have a nice day
Lars H
